# Horizontal Rules

Content above the rule.

---

Content between rules.

***

More content.

___

Even more content.

- - -

Content here.

* * *

Content here.

_ _ _

Content below the last rule.

## Horizontal Rule vs List

Careful not to confuse these:

A paragraph.

---

A paragraph (the above is a horizontal rule).

A paragraph.
- This is a list item (not a rule).

## Horizontal Rule vs Setext Heading

A paragraph.

---

The above `---` is a horizontal rule because the preceding line is blank.

Heading Level 2
---

The above `---` makes a setext heading because it directly follows text.
